title: rubus × orbiculatiformis
intro: Rubus × orbiculatiformis, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a plant species that is a cross between the Rubus argutus and Rubus calycinoides, resulting in a unique and adaptable plant. The plant is used in traditional medicine, with its leaves and roots containing compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × orbiculatiformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
